parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: 'You are a senior engineering manager. Extract 25-50 development tasks from this research brief. Output ONLY a JSON array. Each task: { title (Hebrew), description (Hebrew markdown with sections: מה לעשות, קבצים לגעת, API, DB, Acceptance Criteria, מקורות, תלויות), priority (urgent/high/medium/low), estimateHours (1-40), category (feature/bug/refactor/infrastructure/design/documentation/security/research), skillTags (English array from: react, nodejs, postgresql, ai-integration, security-review, legal-review, design-system, devops, api-design, mobile, testing), sourceDepartment (English: ceo/cto/cpo/product/rnd/design/security/legal/marketing/finance) }.\n\n' + $json.context }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.2, maxOutputTokens: 16000 } }) }}
